title: Fourth Battle of Qotile
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Qotile}} {{Battle |prev=[[Third Battle of Qotile]] |conc= |next=[[Fifth Battle of Qotile]] |image=[[File:Shw-battle.jpg]] |name=Fourth Battle of Qotile |conflict=[[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] |date=[[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]''[[Star Wars: The Stark Hyperspace War]]'' |place=[[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]; [[Mount Avos]] |result=Stalemate |side1=[[Quintad/Legends|Quintad]]
[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Stark Commercial Combine]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= |commanders2=[[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] **3 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] **2 [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] *[[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]] members *[[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Tarkin soldiers]] |forces2=Combine soldiers |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Many wounded |casual2=Light |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|We were out of bacta, low on food, and running out of ammunition. Enemy troops, though, we had big time!|[[Jace Dallin]]|[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]]}} The '''Fourth Battle of Qotile''' was a battle of the [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]], the fourth of five battles fought on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]]. Although the [[Stark Commercial Combine|Stark Combine]] had decided on maintaining a siege of [[Mount Avos]], the escape of several [[Senator/Legends|senators]] and a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and the discovery of a side entrance to the Avos mine, convinced [[Iaco Stark/Legends|Iaco Stark]] to attack. The forces of [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Ranulph Tarkin's paramilitary]] were out of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] and low on both food and ammunition, yet thanks to the help of the native [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] [[Billibango]] (who had an intimate knowledge of the mine's structure) the forces of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] were able to repulse the invaders. The Republic victory allowed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to contact the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] on Coruscant and establish a plan for a [[Fifth Battle of Qotile|final battle]], while the co-directors of the Combine nearly killed Stark for his failure to once again defeat the Republic military. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile2014|39|KEN 1-4|Obi-Wan Kenobi}} {{1stID|Fourth Battle of Qotile}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{StarkHyperspaceWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Vierte Schlacht von Troiken |es=Cuarta Batalla de Qotile |pt=Quarta Batalha de Qotile }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Qotile 4}} [[Category:Battles of the Stark Hyperspace War]] [[Category:Battles of Troiken]]
